response.body:
{"model":"orca-mini","created_at":"2026-03-12T09:54:18.439524809Z","message":{"role":"assistant","content":" Once upon a starlit night, a curious little girl named Lily wandered through the forest, searching for her beloved cat, Boots. She had been missing for days and couldn't stop thinking about him. As she walked, she heard a faint meowing sound behind her. She turned around to see a tiny kitten, shivering and alone, staring up at her with big, pleading eyes.

Lily scooped the kitten up in her arms and held it close to her heart. "You're lost, aren't you?" she asked. The kitten nodded, its fur matted and eyes red from crying. Lily knew just what to do.

She went back to her house and searched through all of her cat toys until she found one that was small enough for the kitten to crawl into. She then went out again and found a cozy spot under a tree where the kitten could hide. She left the kitten there with some food and water, promising to come back later to check on it.

As the night wore on, Lily grew more and more worried about the little kitten. She knew Boots would never survive in the forest without her. Finally, she returned to the spot where she had left the kitten and found it safe and sound, sleeping peacefully.

Lily scooped up the kitten and brought it back home with her. She knew that Boots was grateful to have found a kind friend who would take care of him until he could find his way back home. And so, Lily and Boots became inseparable companions, sharing adventures and exploring the forest together for many years to come."},"done":true,"done_reason":"stop","total_duration":18229476912,"load_duration":17903959,"prompt_eval_count":70,"prompt_eval_duration":687610558,"eval_count":346,"eval_duration":17465724841}
